name: score_property
description: Compute the multi-factor fit score for a specific listing against the current user's profile. Returns dimension scores (affordability, commute, safety, flood, education, healthcare, internet, investment, developer, livability), the weighted total, a plain-language rationale, and any warnings. Always call this before making a detailed recommendation.

listing_id.description: UUID of the listing to score.

weight_overrides.description: Optional map of dimension → weight (0–1) to override the user's default archetype weights for this scoring call. Values must sum to 1.0. Use only when the user explicitly requests a custom weighting (e.g., 'score this as an investment, not a home').
